methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Seed → next-stage step-up multiplier (2.5x) to $10M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.rationale: Median across 4 same-sector + same/adjacent-stage peers in Defense & Security. Range: $60M - $500M.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

private.name: Tenna Systems
private.rationale: Same sector (Defense & Security), same stage (Seed), post-money $60M

data.narrative:
Deterrence is a Seed-stage Defense & Security company founded by Dhruva Rajendra and Henry Olgers, with $10M+ in total raised. Valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of four same-sector peers at Seed and Series A stages (Stark Defence, Vatn Systems, Ares Industries, Tenna Systems), supplemented by a broader set of ten public and private defense technology companies including Anduril Industries and Flock Safety.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-Progression uses the $10M total raised as a value proxy and applies a 2.5x step-up multiplier typical for Seed-to-next-stage advancement, implying a $25M valuation. Peer-Median derives the median valuation across four same-sector, same/adjacent-stage comparables: the four peers span $60M to $500M, with a median of $225M. This wide range reflects heterogeneity in Defense & Security funding trajectories and likely differences in revenue traction and technical maturity among the peer set.

Triangulation of both methods yields a low estimate of $21M, median of $125M, and high of $259M. The wide dispersion—driven primarily by the Peer-Median method's large peer range—reflects material uncertainty about where Deterrence positions within its cohort. Key unknowns include revenue run-rate, customer pipeline maturity, and technology differentiation relative to Stark Defence and Vatn Systems at Series A. The $125M median is supported only if Deterrence's traction and IP warrant positioning near mid-to-upper peers; lower traction would argue toward the $21M–$25M range.
